description: Every permission in default.json must appear here with a demonstrated need. Adding a capability without an entry (or leaving a stale entry) fails the least-privilege guard.

core:default.need: Baseline Tauri core IPC for the app shell

core:window:allow-set-position.need: Position the Management Dock via dockRect

core:event:default.need: Tile onMoved listener so the Dock repositions with the Tile

core:webview:allow-create-webview-window.need: Create the dock WebviewWindow on first open

core:window:allow-show.need: Show the Dock without destroying it

core:window:allow-hide.need: Hide the Dock without destroying it

core:window:allow-outer-position.need: Read Tile outer origin for dockRect input

core:window:allow-outer-size.need: Read Tile outer size for dockRect input

core:window:allow-current-monitor.need: Monitor midpoint for Dock park-side detection
